name: Apricot Almond Bars/Dessert Show
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350 degrees. Grease a 10 by 15 by 1 inch jelly roll pan.
For crust:
1. Mix together 2 cups flour and 1/2 teaspoon salt in a bowl.
2. Beat 3/4 cup butter, powdered sugar, and vanilla together at medium speed until light and fluffy.
3. Turn the mixer to low speed and add the flour mixture to the butter. Beat until well combined. The mixture will be crumbly.
4. Press the dough into the bottom of the jelly roll pan.
5. Bake for 20 minutes until light golden brown. Cool on a wire rack for 5 minutes.
6. Spread preserves over the warm crust and cool completely.
For topping:
1. Combine the remaining 1 1/2 cups flour, baking powder, and 1/2 teaspoon salt in a bowl.
2. Beat together the remaining 3/4 cup butter, sugar, and brown sugar with almond extract until light and fluffy.
3. Add eggs one at a time and beat well. Stir in chopped almonds.
4. Spread evenly over the cooled crust.
5. Bake for 30 minutes until set. Cool completely on a wire rack.
6. Serve cut into bars.
